reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires adding the kernel boot parameter fips=1 and changing the system's cryptographic policy. This modification is not supported on an already installed system, may cause boot failures or incompatibilities with existing software, and typically requires a reboot. The policy explicitly classifies FIPS-related bootloader changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; potential_system_instability; boot_failure; cryptographic_policy_change; possible_service_disruption
